data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of recording for asynchronous viewers, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of a recording feature. The absence of this evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as the evidence does not support that recordings are available for asynchronous viewers.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the existence or functionality of the recording feature for asynchronous viewers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify recording functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if recordings are available for asynchronous viewers.
